scripts.acceptance: pnpm run check && pnpm run check:api-surface && pnpm run test && pnpm run test:browser && pnpm run test:gallery-browser && pnpm run test:integration && pnpm run check:build && pnpm run check:publish && pnpm run test:p10-perf && pnpm run test:compiler-perf && pnpm run test:conformance && pnpm run check:kovo && pnpm run test:authz-paranoid
scripts.check: pnpm run check:inline-loader && pnpm run check:inline-loader:trusted-types && pnpm run check:imports && pnpm run check:no-committed-generated && pnpm run check:spec-index && pnpm run check:security-ledger-index && pnpm run check:authorization-matrix && pnpm run check:sink-policy && pnpm run check:c9-sink-inventory && pnpm run check:framework-export-posture && pnpm run check:threat-matrix && pnpm run check:csrf-mint-delivery && pnpm run check:single-choke && pnpm run check:filesystem-boundary && pnpm run check:egress-boundary && pnpm run check:wire-output-boundary && pnpm run check:tcb-boundary && pnpm run check:security-guarantee && pnpm run check:security-brands && pnpm run check:fail-closed-classifiers && pnpm run check:classifier-verdict-routing && pnpm run check:green-corpus && pnpm run check:security-classifier-corpus && pnpm run check:security-test-builds && pnpm run check:security-gate-mutations && pnpm run check:security-fuzz-campaign && pnpm run check:fundamental-fixes-census && pnpm run check:capability-surface-census && pnpm run check:vp && vp run typecheck-examples
scripts.check:build: pnpm run check:inline-loader && node scripts/egress-floor.mjs --policy build -- vp run build
scripts.check:build:ci: node scripts/egress-floor.mjs --policy build -- vp run build
scripts.check:paranoid-classifiers: KOVO_PARANOID=1 pnpm run check:fail-closed-classifiers && KOVO_PARANOID=1 pnpm run check:classifier-verdict-routing
scripts.check:docs-snippets:dist: pnpm --filter @kovojs/better-auth --filter @kovojs/browser --filter @kovojs/core --filter @kovojs/headless-ui --filter @kovojs/icons --filter @kovojs/server --filter @kovojs/style --filter @kovojs/ui run build:dist && KOVO_DOC_SNIPPETS_USE_DIST=1 node site/scripts/code-snippets-check.mjs
scripts.docs:serve: pnpm run check:build && pnpm --filter @kovojs/site run build && HOST=0.0.0.0 node site/scripts/serve.mjs
